Stripe.Comment: Stripe:SecretKey, Stripe:PublishableKey and Stripe:WebhookSecret are stored in user-secrets (dev) / environment (prod). Never commit keys here. SWITCH TO LIVE KEYS for production.

Twilio.Comment: Twilio:AccountSid, Twilio:AuthToken and Twilio:FromNumber are stored in user-secrets / environment. SMS is no-op until these are set.
